title: Executive Order 10496—Restoring Certain Lands Reserved for Military Purposes to the Jurisdiction of the Territory of Hawaii

flags.justification: This releases land no longer needed for military purposes back to territorial jurisdiction, reducing rather than concentrating authority, consistent with EO 10389.
A clear, specific restoration of four named parcels.
Single purpose covering multiple related parcels.
A land-status action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A one-time restoration action, not a continuing authority grant.
This releases land from federal reservation, the opposite of removing oversight.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
No second agency's competing mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
